name: Burberry Group plc

latest_note.title: FY2025 Annual Report Analysis
latest_note.title_th: การวิเคราะห์รายงานประจำปี FY2025
latest_note.summary: [Financial Performance] Revenue fell 17% to £2.46B (from £2.97B), with operating income turning negative (-£3M) versus £418M in FY2024. Net loss of -£75M vs. net profit of £270M prior year. Gross marg…

top_risks: Luxury demand slowdown in Asia Pacific (comps -16% FY25, China -15%) with no clear inflection timeline
Execution risk remains high — Burberry has undergone multiple strategic resets in the past decade
Elevated leverage (Net Debt £1.1B, Net Debt/EBITDA 2.6x) limits financial flexibility
one_liner: Revenue fell 17% to £2.46B (from £2.97B), with operating income turning negative (-£3M) versus £418M in FY2024.
